test      : TestSignalingAgentRunner_MultiTurn
timestamp : 2026-04-09T22:32:14+02:00
session   : TestSignalingAgentRunner_MultiTurn_1775766733551
input     : Candidate: The GIL prevents true parallelism in CPython because only one thread holds the interpreter lock at a time. For CPU-bound work I use multiprocessing instead.
output    : A: The GIL prevents true parallelism in CPython because only one thread holds the interpreter lock at a time. For CPU-bound work I use multiprocessing instead.
A: The GIL prevents true parallelism in CPython because only one thread holds the interpreter lock at a time. For CPU-bound work I use multiprocessing instead.
